programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Live in Hyde Park

programme.title: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Def Leppard - Hysteria At The O2

programme.title: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London

programme.title: Imagine Dragons - Live At The Moody Theater

programme.title: Tupac Shakur: Before I Wake
programme.desc: A look back on Tupac's final years through the eyes of Rap legends "Eazy-E", Russell Simmons and Tupac's personal bodyguard, Frank Alexander. Featuring never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Tom Petty: Somewhere You Feel Free
programme.desc: Drawn from an archive of 16mm film, Tom Petty works on his 1994 album Wildflowers.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: History, King of Pop
programme.desc: Archival footage tells the story of a reclusive and brilliant world-famous showman as he navigated his life, career, and personal relationships

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Remember the King
programme.desc: There are very few artists who have obsessed the world like Michael Jackson did. Now musical royalty, his singles topped the charts all over the globe, selling over 350 million records whilst holding the record for the best selling album of all time. ...

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Life, Death, and Legacy
programme.desc: In this film we take an intimate look into life of one of the worlds most successful entertainers of all time, a man dubbed as the King of Pop.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts: The Queens of Nashville
programme.desc: Chronicles the incredible careers of five country music superstars from their unassuming beginnings to the world's largest stages, with special antidotes from the artists themselves, friends, family and their influence on other artists.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse - The Legacy
programme.desc: Amy Winehouse was one of the most discussed singer-songwriters of her generation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along - Bob Ross depicts the true beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An abandoned shipping boat hugs a pier in a water scene that Bob Ross completes with some charming old dockside storage sheds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape. Bob Ross uses a canvas painted half black and half white.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Catch a glimpse of the sun trying to break through shades of soft crimson, shining its golden touch upon the land. Bob Ross creates another black canvas beauty today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross in the mountains of the east, and bask in the breathtaking serenity of a waterfall bubbling and splashing, nestled among the evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Luscious green grass and fresh evergreens, purple and pink sky -- giving the water a perfect glow in this Bob Ross black canvas masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Truly picture perfect. A bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beneath a soft purple mountain range, lots of trees and bushes surround a secret little lake, as only Bob Ross can create on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely hike down a weathered pathway with Bob Ross and happen upon an old cabin; create a beautiful oval painting you can be proud of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a little imagination and lots of colors to create this soft, luxurious early autumn lake scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Spend a relaxing half-hour with Bob Ross as he paints a mountain scene with soft, sloping grass cover, crystal lake, and rocky banks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with artist Bob Ross and peer into the north country in the midst of winter; experience a vision in the coldest of azure tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins makes sure the chill of autumn is felt creeping in on the banks of a winding creek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft, serene and near silent, this Bob Ross painting is simple and elegant, with just a lone cabin nestled comfortably into pillows of snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross's project for today is an almost feathery, tranquil landscape setting at the base of a towering mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Swim in the warm water, nap in the luxurious green grass - today Bob Ross creates a wonderful summer mountain scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cleverly constructed shape on canvas! Peek through the panes with artist Bob Ross and share a beautiful snowy day outside.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind masterpiece, Bob Ross paints a vibrant golden-red glow, complete with cowboy restin' a while by the cracklin' flames.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a picturesque spot in the meadow and delight in the discovery of not one, but two serene fishing holes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Ancient rocks, lapping waves and a serene beach are the perfect setting for a flock of seagulls to hunt for their lunch.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the cold shadows with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of a winter night at the foot of a large fierce waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on this colorful Bob Ross display of nature's exciting seashore panarama … beautifully tucked within an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With his trusty brushes, Bob Ross takes us to a beautiful lake hideaway nested below a towering mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Come along with Bob Ross as he creates a winter moon hanging over a snow covered farm nestled among the trees - all on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Explore the backwoods with Bob Ross and happen upon an old, forgotten shanty hidden away in the densest of undergrowth.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross gently places a little old church house upon a bed of snow in front of giant frost-covered mountains in the background.

programme.desc: Donna and James wonder why Maddy left so suddenly. Norma's mother arrives with news…she's married a new man, Ernie Niles. Cooper tells Leland they arrested Ben Horne for Laura's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve reluctantly goes on a dating game show and wins. Much to his pleasnat surprise, his date appears to be everything he's looking for and more.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Death Wish

programme.title: Grease 2

programme.title: Top Gun

programme.title: Real Genius

programme.title: Harriet the Spy

programme.title: America in Color

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Lawmen Of The Old West
programme.desc: As outlaws refined their trade, so too did the lawmen. Federal or state, town or county, public or pr ivate, these men all fought to enforce law and order upon an unruly and violent land.

programme.title: The Vikings

programme.title: The Egyptians

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: The Making of the Mob

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: Our atmosphere is an unbelievably complex machine that protects us from the vacuum of space, shelters us from harmful radiation and allows us and the biosphere to breath; we need to learn much more about it so we can better it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The next 12 months will see an intense rise in flight tests, demonstration launches and high priority flights. Some are on time others are not. We check the flight status of some of this new hardware and these new capabilities.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Invasion Mars
programme.desc: For over 50 years we have bombarded Mars with our probes and landers. Spying from orbit to map terrain, finding her strengths and weaknesses. The time nearing for the full scale invasion of the planet- when humans walk on Mars and claim it for their own.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Amazing Cassini spacecraft and its sibling lander, Huygens, have now concluded their scientific studies, bringing back years of data. Now, Juno piercing the cloak of Jupiter and her distant relative New Horizons at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.desc: As the liberation of France got underway, the citizens of a nation oppressed since 1940 celebrated the Allied arrival with rapture.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
